title: Create AssociationType enum and CreateAssociationCommand DTO
description: Create AssociationType enum (CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP, RELATES_TO) in service package. Create CreateAssociationCommand record with Jakarta validation for source_node_id (UUID), target_node_id (UUID), type (AssociationType), creator_id (String), reason (String), optional confidence (Float [0.0,1.0]).
acceptance_criteria: WHEN valid fields provided THEN command validates successfully; WHEN missing required field (source_node_id, target_node_id, type, creator_id, reason) THEN validation rejects; WHEN confidence < 0.0 or > 1.0 THEN validation rejects; SHALL support exactly CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP and RELATES_TO types; ref: specs/association-model/spec.md; ref: specs/association-crud-api/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Follow existing DecisionCommandValidation pattern from Decision Engine; Use Java record for immutability; Enum restricts to exactly 2 relationship types per req.md §6.4; Confidence null means human-confirmed (design.md Decision 6)
review_regression_requirements: No regression impact — new types only, no existing code modified
notes: Blocks all Phase 2+ tasks; picked_reason:P1基础DTO和枚举，阻塞后续Service/Controller/Test实现; done_at:2026-03-09; evidence:新增AssociationType仅含CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP/RELATES_TO，CreateAssociationCommand添加@NotNull/@NotBlank/@DecimalMin/@DecimalMax约束; validation:mvn -q -DskipTests compile

title: Create AssociationResult and AssociationInfo response records
description: Create AssociationResult record for create/delete API responses (association_id, source_node_id, target_node_id, type, created_at). Create AssociationInfo record for query responses (association_id, type, direction OUTGOING/INCOMING, related_node with node_id+label+content, confidence, reason, creator_id, created_at).
acceptance_criteria: AssociationResult SHALL contain association_id (UUID), source_node_id, target_node_id, type, created_at; AssociationInfo SHALL contain direction (OUTGOING/INCOMING relative to queried node), related_node object with node_id + label + content/summary_content; ref: specs/association-crud-api/spec.md; ref: specs/association-query-api/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Follow existing DecisionResult record pattern; direction field maps relationship direction relative to queried node; related_node label distinguishes Human_Post vs AI_Consensus
review_regression_requirements: No regression impact — new types only
notes: Blocks Phase 3 controller; picked_reason:P1响应模型是Controller与Service联调前置条件; done_at:2026-03-09; evidence:AssociationResult覆盖create/delete响应字段，AssociationInfo覆盖direction和related_node(content/summary_content); validation:mvn -q -DskipTests compile

title: Implement AssociationService createAssociation with MERGE idempotency
description: Create AssociationService with @Service and Neo4jClient injection. Implement createAssociation: validate both node_ids exist via GraphNode label, prevent self-association, execute Cypher MERGE for idempotent relationship creation with association_id + metadata. Add confidence [0.0,1.0] range validation. Wrap in @Transactional.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN valid request THEN relationship created with association_id (UUID), creator_id, reason, confidence, created_at; WHEN source_node_id not found THEN IllegalArgumentException; WHEN target_node_id not found THEN IllegalArgumentException; WHEN source == target THEN IllegalArgumentException; WHEN duplicate (source, target, type) THEN return existing association_id idempotently; WHEN confidence=0.85 THEN stored as relationship property; ref: specs/association-model/spec.md; ref: specs/association-crud-api/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Use Neo4jClient + raw Cypher (design.md Decision 1) — NOT SDN @Relationship; Use MERGE semantics for uniqueness (design.md Decision 3) — no TOCTOU race; Application-generated UUID for association_id (design.md Decision 2); Validate node existence via GraphNode label, not specific type (design.md Decision context)
review_regression_requirements: MERGE under high concurrency may cause short lock contention — Neo4j transaction retry covers this (design.md Risk 3)
notes: Core service — blocks Phase 3 POST controller

title: Implement AssociationService deleteAssociation with audit logging
description: Implement deleteAssociation: find relationship by association_id property, log deletion at INFO level (association_id, source/target node_ids, type), execute DELETE Cypher. Wrap in @Transactional. Throw NoSuchElementException if association_id not found.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN existing association_id THEN relationship deleted from Neo4j AND INFO log emitted with association_id + node_ids + type; WHEN non-existent association_id THEN NoSuchElementException thrown; WHEN deleted THEN subsequent query excludes it; ref: specs/association-crud-api/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Physical delete per design.md Decision 4 — semantic relations are revocable; INFO log is the audit trail (design.md Risk 2 mitigation); Future extensible to audit event table
review_regression_requirements: Deleted associations must not appear in subsequent queries; Verify no orphaned data after deletion

title: Implement AssociationService findAssociationsByNodeId with type filter
description: Implement findAssociationsByNodeId: Cypher query matching BOTH incoming and outgoing CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP|RELATES_TO for a given node_id. Accept optional AssociationType filter. Return List<AssociationInfo> with direction (OUTGOING/INCOMING) resolved relative to queried node. Verify queried node exists first.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN node has outgoing CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP THEN returned with direction=OUTGOING; WHEN node has incoming RELATES_TO THEN returned with direction=INCOMING; WHEN type=CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP filter THEN only CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP returned; WHEN no type filter THEN all associations returned; WHEN node not found THEN NoSuchElementException; WHEN node has no associations THEN empty list; ref: specs/association-query-api/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Bidirectional query despite directed storage (design.md Trade-off 1); MATCH without direction restriction captures both incoming/outgoing; Only returns CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP and RELATES_TO — version evolution excluded by Cypher type filter
review_regression_requirements: Query must not return BRANCHED_FROM/MERGED_INTO/SYNTHESIZED_FROM under any circumstances (lineage isolation)

title: Implement POST /api/associations endpoint
description: Create AssociationController @RestController at /api/associations. Implement POST endpoint accepting CreateAssociationCommand JSON body, calling AssociationService.createAssociation. Return HTTP 201 Created with ApiResponse<AssociationResult> for new associations; HTTP 200 OK for idempotent hits.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN valid POST request THEN HTTP 201 with ApiResponse {code:0, message:"ok", data:{association_id, source_node_id, target_node_id, type, created_at}}; WHEN idempotent duplicate THEN HTTP 200 with existing association_id; WHEN validation fails THEN HTTP 400 with error message; ref: specs/association-crud-api/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Follow existing DecisionController pattern for controller structure; Distinguish 201 (new) vs 200 (idempotent) via service return value; All responses use ApiResponse wrapper

title: Implement DELETE /api/associations/{associationId} endpoint
description: Implement DELETE endpoint at /api/associations/{associationId} (UUID path variable). Call AssociationService.deleteAssociation. Return HTTP 200 with ApiResponse confirming deletion.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN existing association_id THEN HTTP 200 with ApiResponse {code:0, message:"ok", data:{association_id, deleted:true}}; WHEN non-existent association_id THEN HTTP 404; ref: specs/association-crud-api/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Follow RESTful DELETE semantics; 404 for missing handled by GlobalExceptionHandler NoSuchElementException mapping
review_regression_requirements: Verify delete does not cascade to nodes or other relationships

title: Implement GET /api/nodes/{id}/associations endpoint and exception handling
description: Add GET /api/nodes/{id}/associations endpoint (in NodeController or AssociationController). Accept optional type query parameter (CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP, RELATES_TO). Return ApiResponse<List<AssociationInfo>>. Add invalid AssociationType handling to GlobalExceptionHandler (HTTP 400).
acceptance_criteria: WHEN valid node_id THEN HTTP 200 with list of AssociationInfo; WHEN type=CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP filter THEN only that type returned; WHEN no type filter THEN all associations returned; WHEN invalid type value THEN HTTP 400; WHEN node not found THEN HTTP 404; ref: specs/association-query-api/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Endpoint placement: NodeController preferred (node-centric query) vs AssociationController (domain grouping) — follow existing node query pattern; Version evolution relationships must NOT appear in results
review_regression_requirements: Query must never leak BRANCHED_FROM/MERGED_INTO/SYNTHESIZED_FROM into association results (lineage-isolation spec)

title: Verify lineage, provenance, and DAG integrity isolation from semantic associations
description: Review existing Cypher queries: (1) NodeQueryService lineage query — confirm only BRANCHED_FROM|MERGED_INTO traversed; (2) NodeQueryService provenance query — confirm only SYNTHESIZED_FROM traversed; (3) DagIntegrityService cycle check — confirm only BRANCHED_FROM|MERGED_INTO checked. Document verification results. No code change expected — if isolation already holds, mark verified.
acceptance_criteria: Lineage query Cypher explicitly uses [:BRANCHED_FROM|MERGED_INTO*1..N] — no wildcard; Provenance query Cypher explicitly uses [:SYNTHESIZED_FROM] — no wildcard; DagIntegrityService CYCLE_CHECK_QUERY explicitly uses [:BRANCHED_FROM|MERGED_INTO*1..50]; ref: specs/lineage-isolation/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Verify by code inspection — the existing queries should already be type-specific; If any query uses wildcard relationship matching, file a P0 fix task
review_regression_requirements: If queries are refactored in future to use wildcards, semantic associations would leak into lineage — add defensive comment in code
notes: Verification only — code change only if isolation violated

title: Integration tests: association creation (CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP, RELATES_TO, idempotency)
description: Write Testcontainers integration tests: (1) POST creates CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP with all metadata; (2) POST creates RELATES_TO between two Human_Post nodes; (3) duplicate (source, target, type) returns existing association_id without creating duplicate.
acceptance_criteria: Test 1: POST /api/associations with type=CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP → 201, verify relationship in Neo4j with all properties; Test 2: POST with type=RELATES_TO between Human_Post nodes → 201; Test 3: second POST with same (source, target, type) → 200 with same association_id, no duplicate in DB; ref: specs/association-crud-api/spec.md; ref: specs/association-model/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Follow existing DecisionApiIntegrationTest pattern; Use Testcontainers Neo4j; Verify relationship properties via direct Cypher query after API call

title: Integration tests: association creation validation (400 error cases)
description: Write integration tests for all validation failures: (1) non-existent source_node_id → 400; (2) non-existent target_node_id → 400; (3) self-association → 400; (4) invalid type → 400; (5) confidence out of range → 400.
acceptance_criteria: Test 1-2: non-existent node_id → HTTP 400 with error message; Test 3: source == target → HTTP 400 "self-association not allowed"; Test 4: type="INVALID" → HTTP 400; Test 5: confidence=1.5 → HTTP 400; ref: specs/association-crud-api/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Verify exact error messages match spec scenarios; Follow existing DecisionApiIntegrationTest validation pattern

title: Integration tests: association deletion (success and 404)
description: Write integration tests: (1) DELETE existing association → 200, verify relationship removed from Neo4j, subsequent query excludes it; (2) DELETE non-existent association_id → 404.
acceptance_criteria: Test 1: DELETE /api/associations/{id} → 200, Cypher confirms no relationship, GET associations excludes it; Test 2: DELETE with random UUID → 404; ref: specs/association-crud-api/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Create association in setup, then delete and verify cleanup; Verify INFO log emitted (optional — check log appender)

title: Integration tests: association query (bidirectional, type filter)
description: Write integration tests: (1) GET /api/nodes/{id}/associations returns both incoming and outgoing associations with correct direction; (2) GET with type filter returns only matching type.
acceptance_criteria: Test 1: create A→B CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP + C→A RELATES_TO, GET /api/nodes/{A}/associations returns both with correct direction; Test 2: GET with type=CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP returns only A→B; ref: specs/association-query-api/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Verify direction field correctly resolves to OUTGOING/INCOMING relative to queried node; Verify related_node includes label (Human_Post vs AI_Consensus)

title: Integration tests: lineage isolation regression (semantic cycles don't break DAG)
description: Write regression tests: (1) node with CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP — lineage query excludes it; (2) AI_Consensus with RELATES_TO — provenance query excludes it; (3) CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP cycle (A→B→A) does not block merge/branch decision operations.
acceptance_criteria: Test 1: create CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP on lineage node, GET lineage excludes it; Test 2: create RELATES_TO on AI_Consensus, GET provenance excludes it; Test 3: create semantic cycle A↔B, POST /api/decisions/merge with target in cycle → succeeds (no 409); ref: specs/lineage-isolation/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Critical regression — validates req.md §6.1 layer separation; Must run after both association creation and decision engine are available; Tests the interaction between semantic-association-layer and decision-engine
review_regression_requirements: Semantic cycles MUST NOT trigger DagIntegrityViolationException; If this test fails, the dual-layer architecture is broken

title: Unit tests: CreateAssociationCommand validation
description: Write unit tests for CreateAssociationCommand record validation: blank/null source_node_id, target_node_id, type, creator_id, reason; invalid AssociationType value; confidence < 0.0; confidence > 1.0; null confidence (valid).
acceptance_criteria: WHEN blank source_node_id THEN validation fails; WHEN null type THEN validation fails; WHEN confidence=-0.1 THEN validation fails; WHEN confidence=1.1 THEN validation fails; WHEN confidence=null THEN validation passes; ref: specs/association-crud-api/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Follow existing DecisionCommandUnitTest pattern; Test both null and blank string cases for String fields

title: Unit tests: AssociationService business logic (create, delete, query)
description: Write unit tests with mocked Neo4jClient: (1) create — node existence checks, self-association prevention, MERGE idempotency; (2) delete — existing association, non-existent association throws; (3) query — type filter, direction mapping.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN source node not found THEN IllegalArgumentException; WHEN self-association THEN IllegalArgumentException; WHEN MERGE returns existing THEN idempotent result returned; WHEN delete non-existent THEN NoSuchElementException; WHEN query with type filter THEN only matching type passed to Cypher; ref: specs/association-model/spec.md; ref: specs/association-crud-api/spec.md; ref: specs/association-query-api/spec.md
review_initial_requirements: Follow existing DecisionServiceMergeUnitTest mocking pattern; Mock Neo4jClient.query() chain; Test boundary: confidence=0.0 and confidence=1.0 are valid
